title: Electronic Arts Investor Relations
note: Primary investor-relations hub for company filings, earnings releases, and shareholder materials.

title: Electronic Arts Q2 FY26 Earnings Release
note: Provides recent revenue, net income, net bookings, and management commentary about EA's live-service and sports-game strategy.

title: Electronic Arts (EA) - Market capitalization
note: Used for the May 2026 market capitalization input and registry snapshot valuation context.

title: EA Sports FC Official Site
note: Primary product page for the EA Sports FC franchise and its current positioning.

title: The Sims Official Site
note: Primary product page for The Sims franchise and its current consumer-facing positioning.

title: Godot Engine Frequently Asked Questions
note: Documents Godot's open-source, MIT-licensed, modular engine model used as an enabling alternative for community game development.

title: OpenSimulator Main Page
note: Documents OpenSimulator as an open-source, extensible multi-user 3D application server with optional Hypergrid connectivity.

title: Luanti Open Source Voxel Game Engine
note: Documents Luanti as an open-source game creation platform with multiplayer, modding, self-hosting, and a large content ecosystem.
